category_sources: source_facts.description says fsw is a file change monitor with multiple backends.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo points to the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface found for this older fsw project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides an official repository URL; per instruction repo is returned as null.
